center.name: 拉奈島
center.summary: 拉奈島是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联1种鸟类，包括Hawaiʻi ʻamakihi，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: Accessed 18 May 2012. It formerly occurred on Lānai where it was last seen in 1976. It is one of the most common honeycreepers, inhabiting all types of habitat, dry māmane forests to mesic and wet forests, on the islands at elevations from sea level to
